name: frontend-suite
description: Meta-bundle: the frontend category in one install — UI/UX stacks, React, React Native, Vue 3, Next.js, Nuxt, JavaScript, TypeScript, Vite, Three.js, Inertia, Livewire, the generalist web worker, real-component visual decisions (design-preview), greenfield shadcn staging (shadcn-studio), accessibility auditing, and file-aware skill auto-routing (skill-router). Uninstall cleanly with /frontend-suite:uninstall — removes the bundle and prunes its auto-installed plugins.
